expectations.text: has_responsibility_clause: Statement contains 'accept full responsibility for the accuracy, quality, and presentation of the final work'
expectations.evidence: Found verbatim: 'we accept full responsibility for the accuracy, quality, and presentation of the final work'

expectations.text: word_count_in_range: Final statement paragraph is 75-150 words
expectations.evidence: Statement paragraph (from 'In preparing...' to '...final work.') counts ~95 words

expectations.text: no_banned_words: Does not use leveraged, utilized, synergize, cutting-edge, robust, seamless, state-of-the-art, innovative
expectations.evidence: None of the banned words appear in the statement

expectations.text: first_person_voice: Statement uses first-person voice (I or we)
expectations.evidence: Uses 'we' throughout: 'we engaged AI tools', 'We affirm'

expectations.text: heavy_collaboration_reflected: Statement reflects heavy/substantial AI involvement
expectations.evidence: Contains 'Heavy level of AI collaboration' and 'substantial role in co-creating'

notes: All 6 assertions passed. Statement follows CLOUTER structure completely. Shows C/L/O/E steps before final output.
